subject: Mathematics
description: Full K-12 Mathematics curriculum with interactive Phaser-backed lessons

lessons.title: Numbers Take Flight
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are a young pilot learning to fly through a sky of numbers. Each correct answer keeps you soaring higher!

lessons.title: Counting Cloud City
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are the mayor of Cloud City. Citizens need your help counting their treasures to build the next tower.

lessons.title: Shape Detective
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: A mysterious thief has stolen the geometry jewels! Identify shapes to recover them and solve the case.

lessons.title: Addition Treasure Hunt
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are a pirate captain. Addition problems are the treasure maps that lead you to the hidden gold.

lessons.title: Subtraction Island
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: Stranded on Subtraction Island, you must solve problems to build a raft and escape.

lessons.title: Multiplication Asteroid Field
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are a space navigator. Destroy asteroids by answering multiplication problems correctly.

lessons.title: Division Rescue Mission
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are a rescue pilot. Divide supplies fairly among stranded astronauts to complete your mission.

lessons.title: Fraction Chef
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are the head chef of a magical restaurant. Every recipe requires exact fractions.

lessons.title: Decimal Racer
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are a race car driver. Decelerate and accelerate using decimal precision to win the Grand Prix.

lessons.title: Percent Survivor
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are the leader of a jungle expedition. Use percentages to allocate resources and keep your team alive.

lessons.title: Algebra Garden
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are a botanist. Solve algebraic equations to grow the perfect garden and unlock rare plants.

lessons.title: Geometry Architect
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are a master architect. Use geometry to design buildings that withstand earthquakes.

lessons.title: Trigonometry Summit
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are a mountain climber. Use trigonometry to calculate the safest climbing route.

lessons.title: Statistics Cafe
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You run a cafe. Use statistics to understand customer preferences and grow your business.

lessons.title: Calculus Rocket Launch
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are a rocket scientist. Use calculus to calculate the perfect trajectory for Mars.

lessons.title: Advanced Finance Simulator
lessons.subject: Mathematics
lessons.storyHook: You are a financial advisor. Use advanced math to build investment portfolios.
